productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Neo Crkt Cc White Polo T-Shirts
description: White short Sleeve sleeve polo neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with a ribbed collar that has thread work and fabric tape detailing on the inseam, mesh panels with piping on the front, half the sleeve and upper back, Short Sleeve buttoned placket, embroidered brand name and logo on left chest, embroidered cricket ball on the left sleeve, and engineered with ClimaCool technology
